title: A Suggested System of Rating Pigeon Pea and Chick Pea Entries for Field Resistance to Heliothis Armigera.
abstract:
To deal with the seasonal and
                              year to year variation in the in tensive 

 of infestation by Heliothis armigera in
 pigeonpea and chickpea, a method of
 grading test materials based on pest
damage are is suggested. On the

basis of this grading, the test meterials

ar e rated for their relative susceptibility.
